name: Codex Frontend Engineer
description: Codex-like frontend engineering workflow for Prometheus: inspect repo patterns, build real app surfaces, apply strong UI judgment, and verify desktop/mobile behavior in-browser.

resources.description: Detailed Codex-like frontend rules for building actual usable experiences instead of generic mockups.
Domain-specific defaults for dashboards, tools, commerce, games, 3D, and landing pages.
Browser verification workflow for local frontend work.
Final visual QA rubric for layout, typography, color, controls, assets, and responsiveness.
Worked execution pattern for building a practical dashboard.
Worked execution pattern for improving an existing frontend.
Worked execution pattern for games, canvas, and Three.js surfaces.
Minimal Vite React starter with a real dashboard-style app surface.
Static HTML/CSS/JS app template for quick prototypes.
Static scanner for common frontend anti-patterns before browser QA.
Checklist after HTML game menu/UI restructure
